notes:
All 6 templates are already functionally Tailwind-only. Every flagged token is a false positive produced by the coverage tool's naive word-split on class attribute values that contain Handlebars expressions.

circular-icon-button.hbs — '(eq' and 'tone' are fragments from '{{#if (eq tone "success")}}' embedded in the class string. 'tone' is a Handlebars hash param, not a CSS class name.

panel.hbs — '(eq' and 'headerActionTone' are fragments from '{{#if (eq headerActionTone "gold")}}'. The non-tw classes present (wh40k-panel, wh40k-panel-header, wh40k-panel-title, wh40k-panel-count, wh40k-panel-body) are all real CSS classes with active definitions in the monolith; they are not ghosts.

pip-tracker-row.hbs — '--filled' is the suffix of '{{../pipClass}}--filled', a dynamically-built BEM modifier (e.g. 'wh40k-fate-pip--filled'). The monolith has an '&--filled' block at line 3527. Real class, not a ghost.

stat-breakdown-button.hbs — '(eq' and 'position' are fragments from '{{#if (eq position "absolute")}}'. 'position' is a Handlebars hash param.

tab-strip.hbs — '...' appears inside a Handlebars comment path token in the template header comment; 'tabs' is a real Foundry V14 hook class on <nav class="tabs wh40k-navigation ...">. Foundry core (foundry.mjs line 31426) uses closest(".tabs") to walk up the DOM during tab activation, so this class must be preserved.

vital-info-card.hbs — '(eq', 'accent', and '{{#if' are fragments of '{{#if (eq accent "gold")}}'. 'accent' is a Handlebars hash param.
